# Admin interface of Pixelrunner

## Site Overview
Pixelrunner is a matrix LED-screen device, showing various applets what are configured here in the admin interface.

Key technical features include:
- Add, edit or remove applets from a Applet Store with thousands of applets to choose from
- Optionally configure the selected applet (if applicable) to finetune what will be displayed
- Change the order of the configured applets in a playlist to determine when and in what order the applets will be shown on screen
- Configure internet access, screen brightness, etc
- Update the Pixelrunner Operating System and its packages, reboot the device or do a factory reset if needed

## Key Resources (API)
- [Add applet](https://192.168.1.1/api/applet/add): Add an applet from the store
- change order
- update setting of device
- do a reboot of the device

## Other Resources
- [Website](https://pixelrunner.dev) Website of Pixelrunner
